issues.description: Missing DON cost specification. Card text indicates 'DON!! −2' cost mechanic that should be represented in the DSL structure. The Activated trigger should include cost information.

Extraneous second effect with Trigger/GiveDon. The card text only describes the Activated effect (rest + draw). There is no trigger-based DON generation described in the official text. This effect should be removed.
Target scope 'ChooseOpponentCharacter' is acceptable but verbose. 'OpponentCharacter' with maxCost filter is clearer, though current form is not technically incorrect.
